matches_per_year.label: Matches Played per Year
matches_per_year.description: Total ATP main-draw matches recorded each year (Open Era).

avg_aces_per_match.label: Average Aces per Match
avg_aces_per_match.description: Sum of winner + loser aces per match, averaged by year.

avg_double_faults_per_match.label: Average Double Faults per Match
avg_double_faults_per_match.description: Sum of winner + loser double faults per match.

avg_first_serve_pct.label: Average First Serve In %
avg_first_serve_pct.description: Combined first-serves-in / total service points across both players.

avg_break_points_saved_pct.label: Average Break Points Saved %
avg_break_points_saved_pct.description: Combined break points saved / faced across both players.

ace_rate_proxy_court_speed.label: Ace Rate (Court Speed Proxy)
ace_rate_proxy_court_speed.description: Aces per service game by year. A proxy for surface speed; not the ITF Court Pace Index.
